text: AI is increasingly common in the workplace, changing how we work. Automation handles repetitive tasks like data entry, freeing employees for more creative work. Productivity tools, such as smart scheduling and language translation software, help teams complete projects faster. However, this shift also leads to job changes. Some roles disappear, while new ones emerge that require skills in managing AI systems. The key is human-AI collaboration, where people and machines work together to combine strengths—humans provide judgment and empathy, while AI processes large amounts of data quickly. Adapting to these changes is essential for workers today.
